text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: dbaio
Date: Sat Sep  9 20:54:11 UTC 2017
New revision: 449511
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/449511

Log:
  sysutils/immortal: Update to 0.16.0

  - Added option "stderr" that allows logging only standard error output.
  - If using only option "log" combined standard output and standard
    error are used.

  PR:		222123
  Submitted by:	nbari@tequila.io (maintainer)
